Notes: NSIC Tournament Quarterfinals: No. 1 Concordia vs. No. 8 SW Minnesota State
Concordia is ranked #8 in ESPN USA TODAY Top 25 Coaches Poll
Concordia advances to NSIC Tourament Semifinals and will play
No. 5 seed MSU Moorhead on Mar. 7 at 8 p.m.
Game.Officials: Mike Gullingsrud,  Mike Kolness,  Pat Pollard
